articles.title: Starbucks Corporation $SBUX Shares Acquired by Assetmark Inc.
articles.summary: Assetmark Inc. has increased its stake in Starbucks Corporation ($SBUX) by 15.2%, acquiring an additional 51,740 shares, bringing their total holdings to 391,908 shares valued at approximately $33.0 million. This comes as Starbucks reported Q4 EPS of $0.56, missing consensus, but saw a Jefferies upgrade to "Hold" following its China franchise sale. Institutional investors now own 72.29% of Starbucks stock, while insiders have recently engaged in small stock sales, owning about 0.03% of the company.

articles.title: Pumpkin Spice Latte: Seasonal Surge Powers Starbucks Amid Coffee Market Shifts
articles.summary: Starbucks' Pumpkin Spice Latte continues to be a major sales driver, particularly during the fall season, helping the company navigate rising coffee costs and shifting consumer preferences. The iconic drink acts as a cultural phenomenon, boosting sales, driving foot traffic, and reinforcing brand loyalty across various markets. Despite broader challenges like competition and labor costs, the PSL's premium pricing, robust marketing, and adaptability contribute significantly to Starbucks' financial performance and market position.

articles.title: Starbucks Corp. stock rises Tuesday, still underperforms market
articles.summary: Starbucks Corp. (SBUX) stock increased by 1.02% on Tuesday, closing at $98.47. Despite this gain, the stock underperformed the broader market, as the S&P 500 Index rose 1.18% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.66%. This marked the second consecutive day of gains for Starbucks.

articles.title: Fast-Food Chains’ Expansion Plans Could Hit the Brakes by Mideast Tensions, Rising Energy Costs
articles.summary: Fast-food chains' expansion plans globally are likely to slow down due to increased Mideast tensions and rising energy costs. An analyst suggests that these factors are reshaping the operations of major fast-food companies, with some being more vulnerable to these changes than others. The article mentions SBUX, MCD, YUM, and QSP.UT as relevant entities.

articles.title: Starbucks will report quarterly results after the close on April 28
articles.summary: Starbucks Corporation (Nasdaq: SBUX) will release its second quarter fiscal year 2026 financial results after market close on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. A conference call will follow at 1:15 p.m. Pacific Time, webcast on the company’s investor relations website, with a replay available until June 12, 2026. This announcement highlights the company's commitment to transparency regarding its financial performance.
